probes.name: BLTouch
probes.description: The OG probe, wide-compatibility, fragile pin, best suited for unenclosed printers.

probes.name: 3DTouch
probes.description: Clone of BLTouch, available from many vendors, lower cost alternative.

probes.name: CRTouch
probes.description: Variant of BLTouch, features a metal probe pin.

probes.name: MicroProbe
probes.description: Lightweight touch probe.

probes.name: Omron
probes.description: An inductive probe often fit within the Voron x-carriage, clones available with varying quality.

probes.name: SuperPINDA
probes.description: The classic Prusa inductive probe fit on many of their classic printers, similar probes available from other vendors.

probes.name: Klicky
probes.description: Dockable microswitch probe, features a mouse switch for probe, wide printer support, supports fixed docking.

probes.name: Klicky PCB
probes.description: Dockable microswitch probe, variant of Klicky with a PCB main switch body.

probes.name: Quickdraw
probes.description: Dockable microswitch probe.

probes.name: Euclid
probes.description: Dockable microswitch probe, PCB main body.

probes.name: ZeroClick
probes.description: Dockable microswitch probe for Voron V0.

probes.name: Unklicky
probes.description: Dockable probe, high sensitivity conductive probe, many variations for different applications.

probes.name: SlideSwipe
probes.description: Dockable microswitch probe for Voron V0, features a servo dock.

probes.name: SideSwipe
probes.description: Dockable microswitch probe for Voron V0, features a servo dock.

probes.name: TAP
probes.description: Probe designed to allow the X carriage to move in the Z direction for probing, uses a microswitch or optical sensor, often available in CNC aluminum or carbon fiber variants.

probes.name: Boop
probes.description: Similar to TAP, designed for Printers for Ants, features an optical sensor.

probes.name: PZ
probes.description: Nozzle probe featuring a piezoelectric sensor attached to the Revo Voron hotend.

probes.name: ALPS
probes.description: Nozzle probe featuring a pressure sensor attached to a Mellow HeatCore, FluxHeat, or V6 hotend.

probes.name: Z-Probe Membrane
probes.description: Nozzle probe featuring a membrane sensor, must be removed after probing.

probes.name: Z-Probe Piezo20
probes.description: Piezo nozzle probe designed for V6-style hotends.

probes.name: Cartographer
probes.description: Eddy current sensor bed scanner, supports CANbus or USB, built-in ADXL345.

probes.name: Beacon
probes.description: Eddy current sensor bed scanner, supports USB.

probes.name: Eddy
probes.description: Eddy current sensor bed scanner, supports USB, CANBus, or I2C, fits within the Voron X-carriage using the Omron inductive probe mount.

probes.name: Mellow Scanner
probes.description: Eddy current sensor bed scanner, typically paired with the Mellow toolhead board.

probes.name: BD Sensor
probes.description: Eddy current sensor bed probe, supports USB, must be removed after probing.

probes.name: IDM Scanner
probes.description: Eddy current bed sensor, supports CANbus.
